description: Out-of-scope (dissociation, edge-parts): description points clearly to dissociation territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'dissociation'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: There are different parts of me that take over at different times. The version of me at work is so different from the version at home — not just in behavior, it feels like a different person is in there. Sometimes one of them does things and another wakes up to deal with the consequences.
